blurb.en: Across all three pools, SLV is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 42.4% from its peak, with RSI at the 1th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 99.3/100.
blurb.zh: 本期三個池子中，SLV 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 42.4%，RSI 百分位 1%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。公式評分：99.3/100。

blurb.en: META has dipped 28.0% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 27th percentile, momentum is compressed. Smart DCA score: 71.4/100.
blurb.zh: META 距 52 週高點下滑 28.0%，對這類規模的藍籌股來說是相當顯著的回撤。RSI 僅在第 27 百分位，動能明顯收縮。智能定投評分：71.4/100。

blurb.en: COIN is down 61.8% from its high, placing RSI at the 17th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our formula tends to find value. Entry score: 91.4/100.
blurb.zh: COIN 距高點下跌 61.8%，RSI 歷史百分位 17%。成長股波動大，這類深度修正正是公式設計尋找的入場點。入場評分：91.4/100。

blurb.en: AVAX-USD has pulled back 78.5% with RSI at the 1th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Not your typical recommendation. Smart DCA score: 99.2/100.
blurb.zh: AVAX-USD 回撤 78.5%，RSI 百分位 1%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。非典型推薦，公式評分：99.2/100。
